raw_log_normalization: pulled via `gh run view --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line so timestamps lead each line, matching the v1.3 raw.log format.
notes: Single clear jest assertion failure in test/config/get.ts:32 — `pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc`. 1 failed / 9 skipped / 475 passed. Selected as Batch 1 case 1 even though category is test_assertion rather than the originally-suggested dependency_install — pnpm/pnpm dependency_install failures were not the most recent failure surface; this is the closest clean candidate from this repo per phase 2 plan's 'choose closest real cases but document the gap' clause.
